risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: The project faces substantial political and governance risks that are persisting throughout implementation, as indicated by the sustained 'Substantial' rating in the Political and Governance risk category. This affects the project's ability to maintain coordination with government counterparts and ensure stable policy environment for social protection delivery.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance: Substantial (Rating at Approval: Substantial, Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 04 - 19 Feb 2025: Substantial, Proposed Rating: Substantial)

risk_summary: The project operates under a high macroeconomic risk environment in Pakistan, which threatens the sustainability of social protection delivery systems and the government's ability to co-finance and maintain program operations beyond project closure.
evidence_quote: Macroeconomic: High (Rating at Approval: High, Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 04 - 19 Feb 2025: High, Proposed Rating: High)

risk_title: Institutional Capacity and Governance Fragility in Implementation
risk_summary: Substantial institutional capacity risks persist for implementation and sustainability, indicating fragility in government systems' ability to effectively manage and sustain the social protection delivery platform and integrated management information systems.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability: Substantial (Rating at Approval: Substantial, Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 04 - 19 Feb 2025: Substantial, Proposed Rating: Substantial)

risk_title: Technical Design Complexity in Fragile Governance Context
risk_summary: Substantial technical design risks persist, reflecting challenges in implementing complex systems (Unified Beneficiary Registry, integrated MIS, ERP) within a fragile institutional and governance environment in Sindh.
evidence_quote: Technical Design of Project or Program: Substantial (Rating at Approval: Substantial, Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 04 - 19 Feb 2025: Substantial, Proposed Rating: Substantial)
